text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Good morning, world! And what a pristine
morning it is!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The loving warmth of sunlight dappled through
the leaves, pretty little birds singing their darling
songs...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: It is as if the world is celebrating my awakening!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
This must all be the work of that wonderful
Umamusume who appeared in my dreams...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Thank you, me! For this beautiful morning!

text_block_list.name: Phantom Opera O
text_block_list.text:
There is no need for thanks, me. I would gladly
visit you in dreamland, time and time again!
